short_desc: NullPointerException when saving editor with unsaved changes
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. Open a file in the text editor
2. Make changes
3. Ctrl+S

Actual: NPE is thrown and the file is not saved.

java.lang.NullPointerException
	at org.eclipse.ui.internal.SaveHandler.execute(SaveHandler.java:142)
	at org.eclipse.ui.internal.WorkbenchPage.saveEditor(WorkbenchPage.java:2311)
	at org.eclipse.jface.action.Action.runWithEvent(Action.java:499)
Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException: editorInput was null
	at org.eclipse.ui.internal.EditorManager.getInput(EditorManager.java:88)
resolution_note: Added null guard on editorInput in EditorManager.getInput; added regression test.

short_desc: ClassCastException in type inference for generic methods
description:
When inferring the type of a chained generic method call the compiler throws:
java.lang.ClassCastException: org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.SimpleType cannot be cast to org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.ParameterizedType
	at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.compiler.lookup.Scope.inferTypeArguments(Scope.java:4120)
resolution_note: Handle SimpleType in inferTypeArguments before casting.

short_desc: Editor freezes (UI thread deadlock) when opening very large files
description: Opening a 50MB log file freezes the IDE. UI thread is blocked in synchronous read; jstack shows a deadlock between Display.syncExec and the file loader.
resolution_note: Moved file loading off the UI thread; load asynchronously with progress.

short_desc: Memory leak: workspace holds references to closed projects
description: After closing and reopening projects many times, heap grows unbounded. A profiler shows ProjectDescription instances are never released.
resolution_note: Clear listener registrations on project close.

short_desc: Breakpoint markers not cleared after project delete
description: Deleting a project leaves stale breakpoint markers in the Breakpoints view.
resolution_note: Working as intended; markers cleared on restart.

description:
On exit the workbench sometimes logs:
java.lang.IllegalStateException: Widget is disposed
	at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Widget.checkWidget(Widget.java:485)
	at org.eclipse.ui.internal.WorkbenchWindow.close(WorkbenchWindow.java:1102)
resolution_note: Check isDisposed() before closing window widgets on shutdown.

short_desc: Saving a file throws NPE in SaveHandler.execute
description:
Every save attempt throws a NullPointerException from SaveHandler. Same trace as reported elsewhere.
java.lang.NullPointerException
	at org.eclipse.ui.internal.SaveHandler.execute(SaveHandler.java:142)
	at org.eclipse.ui.internal.WorkbenchPage.saveEditor(WorkbenchPage.java:2311)
	at org.eclipse.jface.action.Action.runWithEvent(Action.java:499)
Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException: editorInput was null
	at org.eclipse.ui.internal.EditorManager.getInput(EditorManager.java:88)

short_desc: Find/Replace dialog ignores the case-sensitive option
description: Enabling 'Case sensitive' in Find/Replace has no effect; matches are still case-insensitive.
resolution_note: Propagate caseSensitive flag to the search engine.

description: A full build of a 2000-file workspace fails with java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: GC overhead limit exceeded in the compiler's type binding cache.
resolution_note: Bounded the type binding cache with an LRU; reduced retained heap by 60%.

short_desc: Dark theme: tree selection color is unreadable
description: In the dark theme, selected rows in Package Explorer use dark text on a dark background.

short_desc: Update fails with BundleException on restart
description:
Applying an update then restarting fails:
org.osgi.framework.BundleException: Could not resolve module
	at org.eclipse.osgi.container.Module.start(Module.java:444)
resolution_note: Refresh the resolver state before restart.

short_desc: Tooltip flickers on hover in Package Explorer
description: Hovering over long file names makes the tooltip flicker rapidly.
